examples: The analysis also suggests that pink iguana is one of the earliest examples of species diversification on the islands.
Our species originated around 200,000 years ago, and underwent tremendous diversification, culturally, technologically, linguistically, artistically, for 130,000 years.

To help ensure success, we pay attention to things like proper diversification and risk.
